title: Filipino Pork Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Filipino-inspired stew made with tender pork, potatoes, and vegetables. This dish is perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and sauté until softened.
Add pork and cook until browned.
Add potatoes, carrots, tomato paste, fish sauce, black pepper, and salt.
Pour in enough water to cover the ingredients and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
Check the potatoes for tenderness. If not tender, continue to simmer for another 30 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
